entries.title: PreCompact hook reads a persisted live session journal (#334)
entries.summary: - **#334 — the PreCompact CLI hook can now see real session state.** The `hook-precompact` command runs as a separate process from the MCP server, so it imported `get_session_snapshot()`, read a fresh process-local `SessionJournal`, and emitted a healthy-looking but empty

entries.title: no-change freshness refresh, cache-hit hardening, subset-scoped pruning (#330, #331, #333)
entries.summary: - **#330 — `index_folder` no-change runs now advance the stored `git_head`.** `FreshnessProbe` flags every result `stale_index` when the stored index SHA differs from live HEAD. A commit that changed only non-indexed files (or otherwise left indexed content unchanged) advanced HEAD while all three

entries.title: turn-budget reset, honest budget packing, fast search_text rejection (#327, #328, #329)
entries.summary: - **#327 — Turn budget now resets in every reader, not only post-dispatch.** The idle-gap reset lived solely inside `record_output`, which the server calls after a tool's result is computed. Readers that run during tool execution — `plan_turn`'s budget advisor via `percent_used()`,
